title: hydrocotyle barbarossa
intro: Hydrocotyle barbarossa, also known as Java water spinach or kangkung, is a species of aquatic plant in the hydrocotyle genus. Traditionally used in Southeast Asian medicine, the plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities. The health benefits of Hydrocotyle barbarossa include reducing blood pressure, alleviating fever, and improving digestion. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as being consumed raw in salads or used as a cooking green.
